programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: Little Mix's Leigh-Anne Pinnock explores racism across the music industry and confronts her own experiences as the only black member of the band. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sci-fi drama. When the Doctor arrives in Victorian London he finds a dinosaur rampant in the Thames and a spate of deadly spontaneous combustions.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are plant battlegrounds. New filming techniques allow us to enter the world of plants to see it from their perspective and on their timescale.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: The dark, a world of opportunity for mammals. More than two-thirds prefer the cover of the night, with some now returning to the safety of the shadows in order to avoid us.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: Documentary following endangered species fighting for their survival. David, a chimpanzee in Senegal, tries to overcome threats to his leadership and ensure an heir.

programme.title: Dynasties II
programme.desc: A mother puma must battle rivals, tackle prey nearly three times her size and endure the wild mountain weather of Patagonia in her bid to raise four cubs - her biggest litter yet.

programme.title: Women's Champions League
programme.desc: Arsenal host OL Lyonnes in their Champions League semi-final second leg.

programme.title: Paddy & Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Paddy and Molly head to Vegas as Paddy prepares to face Tony Ferguson in the Octagon. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Paddy & Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Paddy is back in Liverpool to see Molly, who is now preparing for her own fight in Vegas on the back of two losses. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Paddy & Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: As pressure builds for her next fight, Molly visits a wedding venue with partner Ellis. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Paddy & Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Paddy discusses his own mental health and the struggles and pressures he faces, whilst Molly trains in Liverpool for the last time before her fight in Vegas. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Sin City: The Real Las Vegas
programme.desc: Tir Dhondy investigates Las Vegas: from the big spenders to life beyond the bright lights. Contains some upsetting scenes and flashing images.

programme.title: Sin City: The Real Las Vegas
programme.desc: Tir goes even further into the underbelly of Las Vegas. Deals with adult themes.

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: Little Mix's Leigh-Anne Pinnock explores racism across the music industry and confronts her own experiences as the only black member of the band. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads to Suriname, a country with more forest than anywhere else on earth. He kayaks upriver in search of some deadly critters.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads down in a submarine to explore the deep.

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: The teams discover their next checkpoint lies in Zaamin National Park, Uzbekistan.

programme.title: Better Date Than Never
programme.desc: Liv hits the beach for her first ever date, while Charles goes sailing. Dianne meets her first match, and Olivia's date makes a bold proposition.

programme.title: Better Date Than Never
programme.desc: Olivia invites her date to meet the family, and Liv shares a passionate moment on the harbour. Charles continues his search for love, and Dianne ends her first date on a high.

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The designers team up to create uplifting spaces at a London homelessness charity, and Dara Ó Briain pops by to check in on Alan and the new rooms.

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: Four rival families - leopards, hyena, wild dogs and lions - all try to claim a rich corner of Zambian paradise as their home. Who will succeed in ruling this precious kingdom.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: Documentary following endangered species fighting for their survival. David, a chimpanzee in Senegal, tries to overcome threats to his leadership and ensure an heir.

programme.title: Dynasties II
programme.desc: A mother puma must battle rivals, tackle prey nearly three times her size and endure the wild mountain weather of Patagonia in her bid to raise four cubs - her biggest litter yet.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are plant battlegrounds. New filming techniques allow us to enter the world of plants to see it from their perspective and on their timescale.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: The dark, a world of opportunity for mammals. More than two-thirds prefer the cover of the night, with some now returning to the safety of the shadows in order to avoid us.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.
